event_description: User tapped 'Get Started' on the onboarding screen to begin the sign-up flow.
User successfully created an account and verified their email.
User successfully signed in with their email code.
User initiated authentication via a social provider (Google, Facebook, or Apple).
User confirmed their target language selection.
User marked a today's plan item as completed, earning XP.
User tapped the 'Continue Learning' card on the home screen.
